parameters: \nr<Lisnia>Sayu! Sayu, I was so worried about you!

I don’t think he had to die.
and now you must serve me.

\nr<Lisnia>See, you won’t get your way now.
I will kill you. Both of you.
\nr<Lisnia>It’s crazy! So, apparently, Valo is dead.

\nr<Valo>Alayna. Can you please explain to me...
how you got trapped inside that crystal?

\nr<Alayna>If you insist. I will tell you my tale of
\nr<Alayna>It was a long, long time ago. \!
Back before she created the monsters,
before she began being worshipped as a goddess.
she was so caught up in her stupid experiments
that I ended up as a kind of test subject
\nr<Alayna>And, because of her, I was trapped in time for
over a thousand years, can you imagine?
I could’ve been there for even longer.
Everyone I once knew is gone now.
\nr<Alayna>That’s why I had to kill her,\!
she needs to be brought back to life first.\!
That’s why I need this ritual, without it,

to bring back someone you hate? Why?

so the ritual simply didn’t work.
showing interest in the Akuji project himself,
